titles.title: Our Lives Be Shining In This Day

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Darkness comes as told, The love in men grow cold Preaching the Word so bold Now birthrights are sold. The grace of God in spoil The Message in disdain forgotten all the toil Please raise our standards up again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O Lord, Fill our hearts with Your desire Ablaze our lives with Your holy fire Bring us back into Your Word once more Take us all to desperation Gives us all the inspiration Let us walk in Your provided Way; Our lives be shining in this day Our lives be shining in this day.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The judgment now is due the faithful now are few His coming gets nigh true Will be out of the blue The days are closing out We will see Jesus' face Soon will end life's bout With Patience let us run the race

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know the time is running out The message is about to go away Revival's what we need today for the catching away
